title: drymocallis glandulosa subsp. reflexa
intro: Drymocallis glandulosa subsp. reflexa, also known as the sticky cinquefoil or reflexed cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Drymocallis glandulosa subsp. reflexa include the potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use as a treatment for various skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be cautioned due to potential interactions with other medications and allergies.
